en: Status: [OPTIMIZE] Scanned 4h session history, detected signals log_error/protocol_drift/perf_bottleneck, spawned GEP bridge agent (gep_bridge_0008) using gene_gep_repair_from_errors. Feishu report module degraded due to missing feishu-common dependency.
zh: 状态: [优化] 扫描4小时会话历史，检测到信号 log_error/protocol_drift/perf_bottleneck，使用 gene_gep_repair_from_errors 派出 GEP 桥接子代理（gep_bridge_0008）。飞书报告模块因缺少 feishu-common 依赖而降级运行。
